meta.title: The US Air Force could sink Iran's drone carrier with ONE bomb
meta.description:
Go to https://ground.news/Sandboxx to stay fully informed on military developments around the world. Subscribe through my link right now for 40% off their Vantage Plan, which is what I use everyday.

– BREAK –

Get Sandboxx News and AirPower merch now! https://www.sandboxx.us/product-attribute/brand/sandboxx-news/

Iran made a splash in the international media last week by unveiling the nation’s first drone aircraft carrier, the Shahid Bagheri, in what could be a big boost in force projection capabilities for Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps… at least, as long as the U.S. military decides to allow it to exist
